title: berberis haematocarpa
intro: Berberis haematocarpa, also known as the eagleberry or red barberry, is a deciduous shrub native to western North America, characterized by its dark green leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of berberine and other alkaloids. The health benefits of Berberis haematocarpa include its ability to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Berberis haematocarpa is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
